states.name: Ludmilla
states.title: The Paladin Bride
states.description:
Even the flower petals dance, as if in celebration.
"Wait! I have no intention of marrying. This is just a test fit."
A pure white dress and long locks of raven hair. Her cheeks color as pink as the flower petals as she asks, "well? How do I look?"
Someday, someone may have the honor of answering her in truth.

states.name: Ludmilla
states.title: The Paladin Bride
states.description:
The sun fills the air with a golden light as she turns back. "Hurry, dear, come on."
A past that may have been, or a future that may yet be. Even after she lays down her mace, she will surely continue protecting those she loves - her husband, her children, her family.

states.name: Ludmilla
states.title: The Paladin Bride
states.description:
The pale moon tonight illuminates much, but does little to show you her true feelings.
An ancient legend of Eastland tells of a beautiful princess who, when none could win her favor, returned to her home on the moon, never to be seen again.
If you wish to prevent such a thing from happening again, you must speak now, from the heart.
